title: Fee Proposal for Drugs and Medical Devices: Closed consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Fee Proposal for Drugs and Medical Devices: Closed consultation
Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from October 11, 2017 to January 4, 2018
See the Revised Fee Proposal for Drugs and Medical Devices (May 2018)
The goal of the consultation was to update fees for human and veterinary drug and medical device regulatory programs, and as well as obtain feedback from stakeholders on the Fee Proposal for Drugs and Medical Devices .

## Who was the focus of this consultation?
The Government of Canada engaged with:
- Industry stakeholders, including: Medical Devices, Disinfectants, Generic Drugs, Innovators / Biologic Drugs, Over-the-Counter (Non-prescription Drugs), Radiopharmaceutical Drugs and Veterinary Drugs
- Interested members of the public and consumers
As a result of this consultation, Health Canada published a Revised Fee Proposal for Drugs and Medical Devices, which includes stakeholders' feedback and Health Canada's responses.
- Revised Fee Proposal for Drugs and Medical Devices (May 2018)
- Fee Proposal for Drugs and Medical Devices (October 2017)
Cost Recovery Renewal Initiative Resource Management and Operations Directorate Health Products and Food Branch, Health Canada 250 Lanark Avenue Ottawa, ON K1Z1G4
Telephone: 613-957-6690 Email: CRI_IRC_Consultations@hc-sc.gc.ca
